Name: SpaceCocoon
Notes: A sticky object that grabs the player when they get close, unless they have the Spring or Boo power-ups. The player can use the Star Pointer to sling themselves in any direction.

Obj_arg0.Name: Sling Time
Obj_arg0.Description: The amount of time in frames before the player slows down. Default is 80.

Obj_arg1.Name: Height
Obj_arg1.Description: The height of the Sling Pod.
